note: Kit reverted to the original painted glyphs (commit 41243cb). The single-shot forge was found to hand-draw icons in code (PIL) instead of generating them, so its output was untrusted and looked broken (see docs/kit-forge.md). These are restored ORIGINALS, not forge-verified — that is why no asset is marked 'forged'. Re-forge through the verified pipeline (method gate) before claiming 'forged' again.
